title: Simple Planes Fuel Compatability
description: Adds compatibility to other mod liquid fuels.
body:
Add this to the datapacks folder of your worlds.

No, you cant upload this to another site.

Adds compatibility to other mod liquid fuels. I hope to keep updating this. Rates are based off of burn rate ratios developed by Silfryi of the Immersive Engineering/ Immersive Petroleum team, converted by me into a standardized burn rate based of type of fuel. These are the same files i made and being used in the 1.19 version of the mod.

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-planes

Please suggest additional mods and I will try to add them.

Adds compatibility with:
Immersive Engineering
Immersive Petroleum
Mekanism
Pneumaticcraft
Thermal Expansion
Ultimate Car Mod
